Off Calendar Jan-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tenative ruling -- Cross-Defendant SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT demurrer to OEI's Second Amended Cross-Complaint: Demurrer to the 1st Cause of ACtion is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Demurrer to the 2nd Cause of Action is overruled. (JJM/rc) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Pltf/X-Deft San Francisco Unified School District'S Ntc Of Demurrer & Demurrer To Oei'S Amended X-Complt, Calendar Motion: Demurrer, Calendar Motion: Amend Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-06-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- as follows with reference to Cross-Defendant SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT's demurrer to the OEI's Amended Cross-Complaint:
Re Cause of Action 1 -- sustained with leave to amend to plead facts regarding existence of valid contract.
Re Cause of Action 2 -- sustained without leave to amend. OTHERWISE, OVERRULED. (cl)
Joseph Vickstein CSR 4780.
